title: Helldivers 2 - Spread Democracy
description: Brings many of the weapons and creatures from Helldivers 2 to Minecraft!
body:
This mod is Democracy's finest. It adds weapons and aliens found in the Helldivers game series to Minecraft! Face hordes of Terminids and Automatons in a survival-friendly environment! Find old stratagems with supplies and guns left over from the liberation of the planet, or call down your own! STILL IN BETA. MOST FEATURES NOT PRESENT YET.

REQUIRES GECKOLIB
